generated_categories.name: Display Name Validation
generated_categories.description: Covers cases related to the validation of display names, including allowing, requiring, and handling edge cases like trailing spaces or improper escaping.

generated_categories.name: Maximum Length Validation
generated_categories.description: Ensures emails exceeding the maximum length are rejected unless the `ignore_max_length` option is enabled.

generated_categories.name: Host Validation
generated_categories.description: Validates emails against host-specific rules, including blacklists and whitelists.

generated_categories.name: Domain-Specific Validation
generated_categories.description: Covers rules specific to certain domains, such as Gmail, including username constraints and byte length validation.

generated_categories.name: Domain Format Validation
generated_categories.description: Ensures domains are valid FQDNs or IPs based on configuration options.

generated_categories.name: Blacklisted Character Validation
generated_categories.description: Ensures emails with blacklisted characters in the local part are rejected.

generated_categories.name: Local Part Validation
generated_categories.description: Validates the local part of the email, including quoted and unquoted formats, with and without UTF-8 support.
